title:
Inside India newsletter: Amazon, Walmart-owned Flipkart get ready to shake up
India's delivery-in-minutes sector
summary_full: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.
summary_public: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.
